seo.metaTitle: Dedicated Service Management for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: A named service manager for your account — reporting, QBRs, escalations, and expert coordination. Hostopia keeps your digital services running to your satisfaction.

hero.headline: Your Account. Your Advocate.
hero.subheadline: A dedicated service manager who knows your business, owns your satisfaction, and proactively keeps everything running.

howItWorks.heading: A Named Resource Who Owns Your Experience
howItWorks.intro: Your service manager is your day-to-day point of contact — embedded in the details of your business, your KPIs, and your priorities.

cards.title: Day-to-Day Account Ownership
cards.body: One contact for questions, updates, and escalations. They coordinate across Hostopia's engineering, support, product, and operations teams so you don't have to.

cards.title: Reporting and Insights
cards.body: Regular reporting on platform performance, support metrics, and customer activity — with context on what the data means and what action to take.

cards.title: Quarterly Business Reviews
cards.body: Structured QBRs covering performance trends, opportunities, concerns, and priorities for the next quarter.

cards.title: Expert Coordination
cards.body: Need a migration engineer, product manager, or security specialist? Your service manager brings them to the table.

cards.title: Proactive Issue Management
cards.body: Account health monitoring, early flagging, and coordinated resolution — before issues reach your customers.

items.title: Dedicated and Tenured
items.body: Experienced, stable, and committed to your account long-term.

items.title: Strategic Conversations
items.body: Performance, growth, and optimization — not just incident resolution.

items.title: Escalation Desk Access
items.body: Direct line to Hostopia's Partner Relations team.

items.title: Training Coordination
items.body: Onsite sessions, webinars, train-the-trainer programs, and knowledgebase access.

cta.headline: Get a Service Manager Who Knows Your Business
cta.body: Hostopia's Service Management program gives you a named contact invested in your outcomes.
